case_title: BELTRAN, CARLOS vs. CASTLE, MARTHA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT CASTLE, MARTHA LACSON, CLARITA LACSON, MARY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-04-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-18-2000

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTION. OSC TO PLTF. BELTRAN CARLOS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. HEARING SET FOR MAR-15-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-15-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER CARLOS BELTRAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-30-2000 CONTINUED FROM MAR-15-2000 TO MAY-31-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON JAN-11-2000, FTA, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF BELTRAN CARLOS., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-26-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-30-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER CARLOS BELTRAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-14-2000 CONTINUED FROM AUG-30-2000 TO NOV-01-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-31-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER CARLOS BELTRAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-15-2000 CONTINUED FROM MAY-31-2000 TO AUG-30-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
